name: Chinese Winter Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the broth in a saucepan; add the mushrooms and spinach and simmer for 3-4 minutes.
2. Combine the soy sauce, vinegar, pepper, sesame oil, and hot pepper oil in a small bowl; stir to blend, then add to the broth. Taste and adjust seasonings.
3. Add the tofu and the cornstarch-water mixture, stirring constantly. Continue to cook until the soup thickens.
4. Sprinkle cilantro and scallion on top of the soup for garnish. Makes 6 cups.
